optimum-bgfps-tooltip: Cap to 30 FPS when the game window loses focus.
optimum-framepacing-tooltip: Precise sleep/spin timing to reduce micro-stutter.
optimum-shadowcull-tooltip: Entities beyond the threshold cast no shadow.
optimum-repulsion-tooltip: Entities beyond the threshold stop pushing each other.
optimum-dynlight-tooltip: Reduce the dynamic light search radius at lower view distances.
optimum-animblocklod-tooltip: Forges, querns, and other animated blocks skip frames when far away.
optimum-shadowfarveg-tooltip: Vegetation casts no shadow in the far cascade.
optimum-weatherwind-tooltip: Sample wind speed every 4th frame instead of every frame.
optimum-particledist-tooltip: Particle emitters beyond 48 blocks stop spawning.
optimum-chisellod-tooltip: Render chiseled blocks as solid cubes beyond the threshold.
optimum-occlusionscale-tooltip: Skips rendering chunks that are fully hidden behind terrain. The game normally only enables this once 100+ chunks are loaded, so it never helps at low view distances; this option scales that threshold with your view distance instead. No visual difference.
optimum-dynlightcache-tooltip: Every frame the game scans nearby entities for dynamic lights (held torches, glowing creatures). While you stand still, the previous frame's scan is reused instead; it refreshes as soon as you move, or every 15 frames at most, so a new light still shows up within a quarter of a second.
optimum-entitylightbatch-tooltip: Groups visible entity light samples by chunk and uses the vanilla path when coordinates change.
optimum-entityshadercache-tooltip: Shares view and water uniforms plus the animation buffer lookup across compatible entity draws.
optimum-greedymesh-tooltip: Rebuilds chunk geometry with fewer, larger faces by merging identical neighbors (flat stone walls, ceilings, ore seams). Chunks use less video memory and CPU and load with noticeably fewer hitches, in exchange for about 3% average FPS of extra shader work. Needs a game restart to fully apply.
optimum-greedyspan-tooltip: How many blocks one merged face may cover in each direction. Larger sizes mean smaller chunk meshes and smoother chunk loading; 8 performed best in testing. 1 turns merging off entirely. Applies as chunks rebuild - no restart needed.
optimum-greedylighttol-tooltip: Faces only merge when their lighting matches, and with smooth lighting on, tiny differences block most merges. This rounds light levels before comparing: 0 looks pixel-identical to vanilla, 1-2 merge far more with imperceptible darkening (at most 3 levels out of 255), higher values can show faint banding in shaded corners. Applies as chunks rebuild.
optimum-greedyfardist-tooltip: Past this many blocks away, faces merge ignoring the lighting tolerance - shading gradients that far out are too small to see, and distant chunks hold most of the geometry. 0 disables the distance band and keeps one behavior everywhere. Applies as chunks rebuild.
optimum-cmd-status: List every Optimum toggle and its current value, plus diagnostics
optimum-renderscale-tooltip: Render the world at reduced resolution and upscale with AMD FSR edge-aware filtering. Lower scales give more FPS at the cost of some softness. Native = no upscaling.
